git._comment: Reference MCP git server: github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/git. Replace 'uvx' with 'pip' / 'pipx' if you don't use uv. Falls back to plain `git` shell calls if MCP unavailable.

github._comment: Official GitHub MCP server (github.com/github/github-mcp-server). Requires GITHUB_TOKEN in env. Used by /pr and /review-panel for PR + review operations without shelling gh.

_note: MCP servers are OPTIONAL. The plugin's commands all have shell-out fallbacks (gh, git CLI). MCPs improve context isolation and reduce Bash calls. Comment-out any server you don't want auto-loaded.
